title: Ancient Debris Rainbow Animation
description: Makes Ancient Debris have an emissive animated rainbow texture
body:
This makes Ancient Debris have an emissive animated rainbow texture

I created this to make it easier to spot Ancient debris, I found all other options didn't stand out as much as they could. So this was my attempt at making ancient debris almost impossible to miss.

## **NeoForge requirements:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

As of my current knowledge, NeoForge doesn't have any native mods that add support for emissive textures.

As a work around you can use the following:

- [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (NeoForge Version) or [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)

</details>

 

## **Forge requirements:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Option 1 (Highly recommended)
- [MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)
- [MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)

MoreMcmeta supports 1.16.5 and higher
### Option 2 (Not Recommended)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

</details>



## **Fabric requirements:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Option 1 (Highly recommended)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - (Not needed but I highly recommend this)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - (Required if you're using Sodium)

Continuity is only available for 1.17.1 or higher

Continuity only supports Emissive textures on version 1.18.2 or higher

### Option 2
- [MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)
- [MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)

MoreMcmeta supports 1.16.5 and higher

### Option 3 (Not recommended)
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
- [OptiFabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric)


</details>
